title: bupleurum divaricatum f. elegans
intro: Bupleurum divaricatum f. elegans, also known as Bupleurum, is a variant of the Bupleurum divaricatum plant, a flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of the common cold and flu, and supporting liver and kidney function. Bupleurum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is commonly combined with other herbs like ginseng and astragalus to enhance its medicinal properties.
